tools.name: create_share
tools.description: Go live: upload a directory and get a shareable URL. Requires login (spikes login). Returns URL for collecting feedback.

tools.name: delete_spike
tools.description: Remove from history: delete a spike by ID. Permanently removes the feedback. Use sparingly - resolving is usually better.

tools.name: get_element_feedback
tools.description: Target lock: get feedback for a specific CSS selector. Zoom in on what reviewers said about a particular element. Requires selector parameter.

tools.name: get_hotspots
tools.description: Heat map mode: find elements with the most feedback. Identifies hotspots where reviewers clustered. Use this to prioritize what to fix first.

limit.description: Maximum number of hotspots to return (default: 10)

tools.name: get_spikes
tools.description: Dig into the feedback pile. Get all spikes (feedback items) with optional filters for page, rating, or unresolved status. Returns formatted text with spike details.

rating.description: Filter by rating: love, like, meh, or no

tools.name: get_usage
tools.description: Check limits: view your usage stats. Shows spike/share counts and limits. Requires login.

inputSchema.description: Arguments for the get_usage tool (no parameters required)
inputSchema.title: GetUsageArgs

tools.name: list_shares
tools.description: Check inventory: list all your shares. Shows URLs, spike counts, and creation dates. Requires login.

inputSchema.description: Arguments for the list_shares tool (no parameters required)
inputSchema.title: ListSharesArgs

tools.name: resolve_spike
tools.description: Mark done: resolve a spike by ID. Sets resolved=true with timestamp. Use after addressing the feedback.

tools.name: submit_spike
tools.description: Plant a flag: create new feedback. Submit a spike with page, comments, and optional selector/rating. Agent-created spikes get logged to .spikes/feedback.jsonl.

element_text.description: Text content of the element (optional, for element feedback)

rating.description: Rating: love, like, meh, or no

selector.description: CSS selector for element feedback (if provided, creates element spike)

content.text:
